content: I will declare the `isRegisteringVacancy` state in `CompanyDashboard.tsx` to handle the popup visibility.

args.Instruction: "Add isRegisteringVacancy state right below isRegisteringCompany in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.TargetContent: "  // New states for company registration\n  const [isRegisteringCompany, setIsRegisteringCompany] = useState(false);\n  const [editingCompanyId, setEditingCompanyId] = useState<string | null>(null);"
